instructions.instruction: All generated documentation (README, guides, examples) must be in **English** unless the user explicitly requests another language.
instructions.original_snippets: All generated documentation (README, guides, examples) must be in **English** unless the user explicitly requests another language.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger document-engine.

instructions.instruction: Check each row in the Documentation Gaps checklist against the draft. A checklist item **passes** when the docs contain a corresponding section with at least one copyable code example or explicit prose statement. A checklist item **fails** when the section is absent, incomplete, or lacks a concrete example. For each failing item: add the missing section or example, then re-run the checklist from the top. Do not finalize until all critical items pass.
